.searchandfilter input, .searchandfilter select, .searchandfilter button { border-radius: 10px; font-family:montserrat; }
.zoom-img { overflow: hidden; transition: transform 0.4s ease; }
.zoom-img:hover { transform: scale(1.025); box-shadow: 0px 5px 10px rgba(42, 42, 42, 1); }
@media (min-width: 768px) { #coluna-fixa { position: sticky; top: 100px; /* Distância do topo da tela quando fixar */ align-self: flex-start; } }
.searchandfilter { width: 100%; display: flex; gap: 20px; align-items: center;
padding: 30px; border-radius: 10px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
.searchandfilter input[type="text"], .searchandfilter select { flex: 3; min-width: 230px; background-color: #1a1a1a; border: 1px solid #2a2a2a; color: #e5e5e5; padding: 12px 16px; font-size: 14px; border-radius: 10px; font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; outline: none; transition: all 0.2s ease; }
.searchandfilter input::placeholder { color: #9ca3af; }
.searchandfilter input[type="text"]:focus, .searchandfilter select:focus { border-color: #3b82f6; background-color: #202020; }
/* Wrapper relativo */ .searchandfilter select { appearance: none; position: relative; padding-right: 35px; /* espaço pra seta */ }
/* Criando a seta */ .searchandfilter select { background-image: linear-gradient(45deg, transparent 50%, #aaa 50%), linear-gradient(135deg, #aaa 50%, transparent 50%); background-position: calc(100% - 15px) calc(50% - 3px), calc(100% - 10px) calc(50% - 3px); background-size: 6px 6px, 6px 6px; background-repeat: no-repeat; }
.searchandfilter input[type="submit"] { flex: 0; white-space: nowrap; background-color: #D4A942; color: #000; border: none; padding: 12px 22px; border-radius: 10px; font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: 0.2s ease; }
.searchandfilter input[type="submit"]:hover { background-color: #b89336; }
@media (max-width: 768px) { .searchandfilter { flex-direction: column; align-items: stretch; }
.searchandfilter input[type="submit"] { width: 100%; } }
.zoom-img { overflow: hidden; transition: transform 0.4s ease; }
.zoom-img:hover { transform: scale(1.025); box-shadow: 0px 5px 10px rgba(42, 42, 42, 1); }
@media (min-width: 768px) { #coluna-fixa { position: sticky; top: 100px; align-self: flex-start; } }
a i.ico-menu { padding: 14px 10px 10px 10px; width: 50px; height: 50px; margin-right: 10px; font-size: 25px; color:#ffffff; text-align: center; border-radius: 100px; background: #000000; }
a:hover i.ico-menu { background: #ffffff; }

<h3>Envie uma mensagem</h3> <label for="mf-input-text-70598782"> ${ parent.decodeEntities(`Nome completo`) } * </label> <input type="text" class="mf-input mf-conditional-input" id="mf-input-text-70598782" name="nameClient" placeholder="${ parent.decodeEntities(`Seu nome completo`) } " onInput=${parent.handleChange} onBlur=${parent.handleChange} aria-invalid=${validation.errors['nameClient'] ? 'true' : 'false'} ref=${el =>{ parent.activateValidation({"message":"Esse campo u00e9 obrigatu00f3rio.","minLength":1,"maxLength":"","type":"none","required":true,"expression":"null"}, el) }} /> <${validation.ErrorMessage} errors=${validation.errors} name="nameClient" as=${html``} /> <label for="mf-input-email-e16f78e"> ${ parent.decodeEntities(`E-mail`) } * </label> <input type="email" defaultValue="" class="mf-input mf-conditional-input" id="mf-input-email-e16f78e" name="emailClient" placeholder="${ parent.decodeEntities(`seu@email.com`) } " onBlur=${parent.handleChange} onFocus=${parent.handleChange} aria-invalid=${validation.errors['emailClient'] ? 'true' : 'false' } ref=${el=> parent.activateValidation({"message":"Esse campo u00e9 obrigatu00f3rio.","emailMessage":"Please enter a valid Email address","minLength":1,"maxLength":"","type":"none","required":true,"expression":"null"}, el)} /> <${validation.ErrorMessage} errors=${validation.errors} name="emailClient" as=${html``} /> <label for="mf-input-telephone-c17189d"> ${ parent.decodeEntities(`Telefone`) } * </label> <input type="tel" class="mf-input mf-conditional-input" id="mf-input-telephone-c17189d" name="telefone" placeholder="${ parent.decodeEntities(`(11) 99999-9999`) } " onInput=${parent.handleChange} aria-invalid=${validation.errors['telefone'] ? 'true' : 'false'} ref=${el => parent.activateValidation({"message":"Esse campo u00e9 obrigatu00f3rio.","minLength":1,"maxLength":"","type":"none","required":true,"expression":"null"}, el)} /> <${validation.ErrorMessage} errors=${validation.errors} name="telefone" as=${html``} /> <h3>Mensagem</h3> <textarea id="mf-input-text-area-5229828" name="message" placeholder="${ parent.decodeEntities(`Como podemos te ajudar?`) } " cols="30" rows="10" onInput=${ parent.handleChange } aria-invalid=${validation.errors['message'] ? 'true' : 'false'} ref=${ el => parent.activateValidation({"message":"Esse campo u00e9 obrigatu00f3rio.","minLength":1,"maxLength":"","type":"none","required":true,"expression":"null"}, el)} ></textarea> <${validation.ErrorMessage} errors=${validation.errors} name="message" as=${html``} /> <button type="submit" id=""> <svg aria-hidden="true" viewBox="0 0 512 512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M440 6.5L24 246.4c-34.4 19.9-31.1 70.8 5.7 85.9L144 379.6V464c0 46.4 59.2 65.5 86.6 28.6l43.8-59.1 111.9 46.2c5.9 2.4 12.1 3.6 18.3 3.6 8.2 0 16.3-2.1 23.6-6.2 12.8-7.2 21.6-20 23.9-34.5l59.4-387.2c6.1-40.1-36.9-68.8-71.5-48.9zM192 464v-64.6l36.6 15.1L192 464zm212.6-28.7l-153.8-63.5L391 169.5c10.7-15.5-9.5-33.5-23.7-21.2L155.8 332.6 48 288 464 48l-59.4 387.3z"></path></svg> ${ parent.decodeEntities(`Enviar Mensagem`) } </button>

<!-- wp:quote --> <blockquote class="wp-block-quote"> <!-- wp:paragraph --> <p>Hi there! I'm a bike messenger by day, aspiring actor by night, and this is my website. <!-- wp:quote --> <blockquote class="wp-block-quote"> <!-- wp:paragraph --> <p>The XYZ Doohickey Company was founded in 1971, and has been providing quality doohickeys to the public ever since. Located in Gotham City, XYZ employs over 2,000 people and does all kinds of awesome things for the Gotham community.</p> <!-- /wp:paragraph --> </blockquote> <!-- /wp:quote -->
<!-- wp:paragraph --> <p>As a new WordPress user, you should go to <a href="https://horizonteconstrutora.newbie4.com/wp-admin/">your dashboard</a> to delete this page and create new pages for your content. Have fun!</p> <!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:heading --> <h2 class="wp-block-heading">Who we are</h2> <!-- /wp:heading --> <!-- wp:paragraph --> <p><strong class="privacy-policy-tutorial">Suggested text: </strong>Our website address is: https://horizonteconstrutora.newbie4.com.</p> <!-- /wp:paragraph --> <!-- wp:heading --> <h2 class="wp-block-heading">Comments</h2> <!-- /wp:heading --> <!-- wp:paragraph --> <p><strong class="privacy-policy-tutorial">Suggested text: </strong>When visitors leave comments on the site we collect the data shown in the comments form, and also the visitor’s IP address and browser user agent string to help spam detection.</p> <!-- /wp:paragraph --> <!-- wp:paragraph --> <p>An anonymized string created from your email address (also called a hash) may be provided to the Gravatar service to see if you are using it. The Gravatar service privacy policy is available here: https://automattic.com/privacy/. After approval of your comment, your profile picture is visible to the public in the context of your comment.</p> <!-- /wp:paragraph --> <!-- wp:heading --> <h2 class="wp-block-heading">Media</h2> <!-- /wp:heading --> <!-- wp:paragraph --> <p><strong class="privacy-policy-tutorial">Suggested text: </strong>If you upload images to the website, you should avoid uploading images with embedded location data (EXIF GPS) included. Visitors to the website can download and extract any location data from images on the website.</p> <!-- /wp:paragraph --> <!-- wp:heading --> <h2 class="wp-block-heading">Cookies</h2> <!-- /wp:heading --> <!-- wp:paragraph --> <p><strong class="privacy-policy-tutorial">Suggested text: </strong>If you leave a comment on our site you may opt-in to saving your name, email address and website in cookies. These are for your convenience so that you do not have to fill in your details again when you leave another comment. These cookies will last for one year.</p> <!-- /wp:paragraph --> <!-- wp:paragraph --> <p>If you visit our login page, we will set a temporary cookie to determine if your browser accepts cookies. This cookie contains no personal data and is discarded when you close your browser.</p> <!-- /wp:paragraph --> <!-- wp:paragraph --> <p>When you log in, we will also set up several cookies to save your login information and your screen display choices. Login cookies last for two days, and screen options cookies last for a year. If you select "Remember Me", your login will persist for two weeks. If you log out of your account, the login cookies will be removed.</p> <!-- /wp:paragraph --> <!-- wp:paragraph --> <p>If you edit or publish an article, an additional cookie will be saved in your browser. This cookie includes no personal data and simply indicates the post ID of the article you just edited. It expires after 1 day.</p> <!-- /wp:paragraph --> <!-- wp:heading --> <h2 class="wp-block-heading">Embedded content from other websites</h2> <!-- /wp:heading --> <!-- wp:paragraph --> <p><strong class="privacy-policy-tutorial">Suggested text: </strong>Articles on this site may include embedded content (e.g. videos, images, articles, etc.). Embedded content from other websites behaves in the exact same way as if the visitor has visited the other website.</p> <!-- /wp:paragraph --> <!-- wp:paragraph --> <p>These websites may collect data about you, use cookies, embed additional third-party tracking, and monitor your interaction with that embedded content, including tracking your interaction with the embedded content if you have an account and are logged in to that website.</p> <!-- /wp:paragraph --> <!-- wp:heading --> <h2 class="wp-block-heading">Who we share your data with</h2> <!-- /wp:heading --> <!-- wp:paragraph --> <p><strong class="privacy-policy-tutorial">Suggested text: </strong>If you request a password reset, your IP address will be included in the reset email.</p> <!-- /wp:paragraph --> <!-- wp:heading --> <h2 class="wp-block-heading">How long we retain your data</h2> <!-- /wp:heading --> <!-- wp:paragraph --> <p><strong class="privacy-policy-tutorial">Suggested text: </strong>If you leave a comment, the comment and its metadata are retained indefinitely. This is so we can recognize and approve any follow-up comments automatically instead of holding them in a moderation queue.</p> <!-- /wp:paragraph --> <!-- wp:paragraph --> <p>For users that register on our website (if any), we also store the personal information they provide in their user profile. All users can see, edit, or delete their personal information at any time (except they cannot change their username). Website administrators can also see and edit that information.</p> <!-- /wp:paragraph --> <!-- wp:heading --> <h2 class="wp-block-heading">What rights you have over your data</h2> <!-- /wp:heading --> <!-- wp:paragraph --> <p><strong class="privacy-policy-tutorial">Suggested text: </strong>If you have an account on this site, or have left comments, you can request to receive an exported file of the personal data we hold about you, including any data you have provided to us. You can also request that we erase any personal data we hold about you. This does not include any data we are obliged to keep for administrative, legal, or security purposes.</p> <!-- /wp:paragraph --> <!-- wp:heading --> <h2 class="wp-block-heading">Where your data is sent</h2> <!-- /wp:heading --> <!-- wp:paragraph --> <p><strong class="privacy-policy-tutorial">Suggested text: </strong>Visitor comments may be checked through an automated spam detection service.</p> <!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<h2>Sobre a Horizonte</h2> <p>Construindo o futuro com qualidade, inovação e compromisso</p> <h2>Nossa História</h2> <p data-fg-chsy22="2.41:2.11957:/src/app/pages/Sobre.tsx:73:17:2859:272:e:p:t" data-fgid-chsy22=":r1cr:">Fundada em 1994, a Horizonte Construtora nasceu do sonho de transformar o mercado imobiliário brasileiro, trazendo empreendimentos de alto padrão que aliam qualidade, design e sustentabilidade.</p><p data-fg-chsy24="2.41:2.11957:/src/app/pages/Sobre.tsx:78:17:3148:353:e:p:t" data-fgid-chsy24=":r1cs:">Ao longo de mais de 30 anos de atuação, construímos nossa reputação projeto a projeto, sempre priorizando a satisfação dos nossos clientes e a excelência em cada detalhe. Nossa trajetória é marcada por inovação, comprometimento e respeito ao meio ambiente.</p><p data-fg-chsy26="2.41:2.11957:/src/app/pages/Sobre.tsx:84:17:3518:334:e:p:t" data-fgid-chsy26=":r1ct:">Hoje, somos referência no segmento de alto padrão, com presença nas principais capitais do país e um portfólio que transforma cidades e vidas. Seguimos expandindo nossos horizontes, sempre com o mesmo compromisso que nos trouxe até aqui.</p> <img width="800" height="533" src="https://horizonteconstrutora.newbie4.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/sobre-historia-1024x682.jpg" alt="" <h2>Entre em Contato</h2> <p>Estamos prontos para ajudá-lo a encontrar o imóvel dos seus sonhos</p> <!----------------------------- * controls_data : find the the props passed indie of data attribute * props.SubmitResponseMarkup : contains the markup of error or success message * https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference/Template_literals --------------------------- --> <h2>Preencha o formulário de contato:</h2> <p data-start="0" data-end="136">Quer conhecer de perto o seu próximo lar ou tirar dúvidas sobre o seu projeto? Estamos aqui para te ajudar em cada etapa da sua jornada.</p><p data-start="138" data-end="410">Entre em contato com a nossa equipe e descubra como podemos transformar o seu sonho em realidade. Seja para comprar, investir ou simplesmente entender melhor nossos empreendimentos, oferecemos atendimento personalizado, transparente e focado no que você realmente precisa.</p><p data-start="412" data-end="561" data-is-last-node="" data-is-only-node="">Não perca a oportunidade de falar com especialistas que entendem de construção e, principalmente, entendem de pessoas. Estamos prontos para te ouvir.</p> <a target="_blank"> Facebook <svg aria-hidden="true" viewBox="0 0 512 512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M504 256C504 119 393 8 256 8S8 119 8 256c0 123.78 90.69 226.38 209.25 245V327.69h-63V256h63v-54.64c0-62.15 37-96.48 93.67-96.48 27.14 0 55.52 4.84 55.52 4.84v61h-31.28c-30.8 0-40.41 19.12-40.41 38.73V256h68.78l-11 71.69h-57.78V501C413.31 482.38 504 379.78 504 256z"></path></svg> </a> <a target="_blank"> X-twitter <svg aria-hidden="true" viewBox="0 0 512 512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M389.2 48h70.6L305.6 224.2 487 464H345L233.7 318.6 106.5 464H35.8L200.7 275.5 26.8 48H172.4L272.9 180.9 389.2 48zM364.4 421.8h39.1L151.1 88h-42L364.4 421.8z"></path></svg> </a> <a target="_blank"> Linkedin <svg aria-hidden="true" viewBox="0 0 448 512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M416 32H31.9C14.3 32 0 46.5 0 64.3v383.4C0 465.5 14.3 480 31.9 480H416c17.6 0 32-14.5 32-32.3V64.3c0-17.8-14.4-32.3-32-32.3zM135.4 416H69V202.2h66.5V416zm-33.2-243c-21.3 0-38.5-17.3-38.5-38.5S80.9 96 102.2 96c21.2 0 38.5 17.3 38.5 38.5 0 21.3-17.2 38.5-38.5 38.5zm282.1 243h-66.4V312c0-24.8-.5-56.7-34.5-56.7-34.6 0-39.9 27-39.9 54.9V416h-66.4V202.2h63.7v29.2h.9c8.9-16.8 30.6-34.5 62.9-34.5 67.2 0 79.7 44.3 79.7 101.9V416z"></path></svg> </a> <h2>Nossa Localização</h2> <iframe loading="lazy" src="https://maps.google.com/maps?q=Av.%20Paulista%2C%201000%20-%2010%C2%BA%20andar%20-%20Bela%20Vista&t=m&z=11&output=embed&iwloc=near" title="Av. Refund and Returns Policy https://horizonteconstrutora.newbie4.com/?page_id=1256 Mon, 04 May 2026 01:04:58 +0000 admin https://horizonteconstrutora.newbie4.com/?page_id=1256
<!-- wp:paragraph --> <p><b>This is a sample page.</b></p> <!-- /wp:paragraph -->
<!-- wp:heading --> <h2 class="wp-block-heading">Overview</h2> <!-- /wp:heading -->
<!-- wp:paragraph --> <p>Our refund and returns policy lasts 30 days. If 30 days have passed since your purchase, we can’t offer you a full refund or exchange.</p> <!-- /wp:paragraph -->
<!-- wp:paragraph --> <p>To be eligible for a return, your item must be unused and in the same condition that you received it. It must also be in the original packaging.</p> <!-- /wp:paragraph -->
<!-- wp:paragraph --> <p>Several types of goods are exempt from being returned. Perishable goods such as food, flowers, newspapers or magazines cannot be returned. We also do not accept products that are intimate or sanitary goods, hazardous materials, or flammable liquids or gases.</p> <!-- /wp:paragraph -->
<!-- wp:paragraph --> <p>Additional non-returnable items:</p> <!-- /wp:paragraph -->
<!-- wp:list --> <ul> <li>Gift cards</li> <li>Downloadable software products</li> <li>Some health and personal care items</li> </ul> <!-- /wp:list -->
<!-- wp:paragraph --> <p>To complete your return, we require a receipt or proof of purchase.</p> <!-- /wp:paragraph -->
<!-- wp:paragraph --> <p>Please do not send your purchase back to the manufacturer.</p> <!-- /wp:paragraph -->
<!-- wp:paragraph --> <p>There are certain situations where only partial refunds are granted:</p> <!-- /wp:paragraph -->
<!-- wp:list --> <ul> <li>Book with obvious signs of use</li> <li>CD, DVD, VHS tape, software, video game, cassette tape, or vinyl record that has been opened.</li> <li>Any item not in its original condition, is damaged or missing parts for reasons not due to our error.</li> <li>Any item that is returned more than 30 days after delivery</li> </ul> <!-- /wp:list -->
<!-- wp:heading --> <h2 class="wp-block-heading">Refunds</h2> <!-- /wp:heading -->
<!-- wp:paragraph --> <p>Once your return is received and inspected, we will send you an email to notify you that we have received your returned item. We will also notify you of the approval or rejection of your refund.</p> <!-- /wp:paragraph -->
<!-- wp:paragraph --> <p>If you are approved, then your refund will be processed, and a credit will automatically be applied to your credit card or original method of payment, within a certain amount of days.</p> <!-- /wp:paragraph -->
<!-- wp:heading {"level":3} --> <h3 class="wp-block-heading">Late or missing refunds</h3> <!-- /wp:heading -->
<!-- wp:paragraph --> <p>If you haven’t received a refund yet, first check your bank account again.</p> <!-- /wp:paragraph -->
<!-- wp:paragraph --> <p>Then contact your credit card company, it may take some time before your refund is officially posted.</p> <!-- /wp:paragraph -->
<!-- wp:paragraph --> <p>Next contact your bank. There is often some processing time before a refund is posted.</p> <!-- /wp:paragraph -->
<!-- wp:paragraph --> <p>If you’ve done all of this and you still have not received your refund yet, please contact us at {email address}.</p> <!-- /wp:paragraph -->
<!-- wp:heading {"level":3} --> <h3 class="wp-block-heading">Sale items</h3> <!-- /wp:heading -->
<!-- wp:paragraph --> <p>Only regular priced items may be refunded. Sale items cannot be refunded.</p> <!-- /wp:paragraph -->
<!-- wp:heading --> <h2 class="wp-block-heading">Exchanges</h2> <!-- /wp:heading -->
<!-- wp:paragraph --> <p>We only replace items if they are defective or damaged. If you need to exchange it for the same item, send us an email at {email address} and send your item to: {physical address}.</p> <!-- /wp:paragraph -->
<!-- wp:heading --> <h2 class="wp-block-heading">Gifts</h2> <!-- /wp:heading -->
<!-- wp:paragraph --> <p>If the item was marked as a gift when purchased and shipped directly to you, you’ll receive a gift credit for the value of your return. Once the returned item is received, a gift certificate will be mailed to you.</p> <!-- /wp:paragraph -->
<!-- wp:paragraph --> <p>If the item wasn’t marked as a gift when purchased, or the gift giver had the order shipped to themselves to give to you later, we will send a refund to the gift giver and they will find out about your return.</p> <!-- /wp:paragraph -->
<!-- wp:heading --> <h2 class="wp-block-heading">Shipping returns</h2> <!-- /wp:heading -->
<!-- wp:paragraph --> <p>To return your product, you should mail your product to: {physical address}.</p> <!-- /wp:paragraph -->
<!-- wp:paragraph --> <p>You will be responsible for paying for your own shipping costs for returning your item. Shipping costs are non-refundable. If you receive a refund, the cost of return shipping will be deducted from your refund.</p> <!-- /wp:paragraph -->
<!-- wp:paragraph --> <p>Depending on where you live, the time it may take for your exchanged product to reach you may vary.</p> <!-- /wp:paragraph -->
<!-- wp:paragraph --> <p>If you are returning more expensive items, you may consider using a trackable shipping service or purchasing shipping insurance. We don’t guarantee that we will receive your returned item.</p> <!-- /wp:paragraph -->
<!-- wp:heading --> <h2 class="wp-block-heading">Need help?</h2> <!-- /wp:heading -->
<!-- wp:paragraph --> <p>Contact us at {email} for questions related to refunds and returns.</p> <!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:paragraph --> <p><b>This is a sample page.</b></p> <!-- /wp:paragraph -->
<!-- wp:heading --> <h2 class="wp-block-heading">Overview</h2> <!-- /wp:heading -->
<!-- wp:paragraph --> <p>Our refund and returns policy lasts 30 days. If 30 days have passed since your purchase, we can’t offer you a full refund or exchange.</p> <!-- /wp:paragraph -->
<!-- wp:paragraph --> <p>To be eligible for a return, your item must be unused and in the same condition that you received it. It must also be in the original packaging.</p> <!-- /wp:paragraph -->
<!-- wp:paragraph --> <p>Several types of goods are exempt from being returned. Perishable goods such as food, flowers, newspapers or magazines cannot be returned. We also do not accept products that are intimate or sanitary goods, hazardous materials, or flammable liquids or gases.</p> <!-- /wp:paragraph -->
<!-- wp:paragraph --> <p>Additional non-returnable items:</p> <!-- /wp:paragraph -->
<!-- wp:list --> <ul> <li>Gift cards</li> <li>Downloadable software products</li> <li>Some health and personal care items</li> </ul> <!-- /wp:list -->
<!-- wp:paragraph --> <p>To complete your return, we require a receipt or proof of purchase.</p> <!-- /wp:paragraph -->
<!-- wp:paragraph --> <p>Please do not send your purchase back to the manufacturer.</p> <!-- /wp:paragraph -->
<!-- wp:paragraph --> <p>There are certain situations where only partial refunds are granted:</p> <!-- /wp:paragraph -->
<!-- wp:list --> <ul> <li>Book with obvious signs of use</li> <li>CD, DVD, VHS tape, software, video game, cassette tape, or vinyl record that has been opened.</li> <li>Any item not in its original condition, is damaged or missing parts for reasons not due to our error.</li> <li>Any item that is returned more than 30 days after delivery</li> </ul> <!-- /wp:list -->
<!-- wp:heading --> <h2 class="wp-block-heading">Refunds</h2> <!-- /wp:heading -->
<!-- wp:paragraph --> <p>Once your return is received and inspected, we will send you an email to notify you that we have received your returned item. We will also notify you of the approval or rejection of your refund.</p> <!-- /wp:paragraph -->
<!-- wp:paragraph --> <p>If you are approved, then your refund will be processed, and a credit will automatically be applied to your credit card or original method of payment, within a certain amount of days.</p> <!-- /wp:paragraph -->
<!-- wp:heading {"level":3} --> <h3 class="wp-block-heading">Late or missing refunds</h3> <!-- /wp:heading -->
<!-- wp:paragraph --> <p>If you haven’t received a refund yet, first check your bank account again.</p> <!-- /wp:paragraph -->
<!-- wp:paragraph --> <p>Then contact your credit card company, it may take some time before your refund is officially posted.</p> <!-- /wp:paragraph -->
<!-- wp:paragraph --> <p>Next contact your bank. There is often some processing time before a refund is posted.</p> <!-- /wp:paragraph -->
<!-- wp:paragraph --> <p>If you’ve done all of this and you still have not received your refund yet, please contact us at {email address}.</p> <!-- /wp:paragraph -->
<!-- wp:heading {"level":3} --> <h3 class="wp-block-heading">Sale items</h3> <!-- /wp:heading -->
<!-- wp:paragraph --> <p>Only regular priced items may be refunded. Sale items cannot be refunded.</p> <!-- /wp:paragraph -->
<!-- wp:heading --> <h2 class="wp-block-heading">Exchanges</h2> <!-- /wp:heading -->
<!-- wp:paragraph --> <p>We only replace items if they are defective or damaged. If you need to exchange it for the same item, send us an email at {email address} and send your item to: {physical address}.</p> <!-- /wp:paragraph -->
<!-- wp:heading --> <h2 class="wp-block-heading">Gifts</h2> <!-- /wp:heading -->
<!-- wp:paragraph --> <p>If the item was marked as a gift when purchased and shipped directly to you, you’ll receive a gift credit for the value of your return. Once the returned item is received, a gift certificate will be mailed to you.</p> <!-- /wp:paragraph -->
<!-- wp:paragraph --> <p>If the item wasn’t marked as a gift when purchased, or the gift giver had the order shipped to themselves to give to you later, we will send a refund to the gift giver and they will find out about your return.</p> <!-- /wp:paragraph -->
<!-- wp:heading --> <h2 class="wp-block-heading">Shipping returns</h2> <!-- /wp:heading -->
<!-- wp:paragraph --> <p>To return your product, you should mail your product to: {physical address}.</p> <!-- /wp:paragraph -->
<!-- wp:paragraph --> <p>You will be responsible for paying for your own shipping costs for returning your item. Shipping costs are non-refundable. If you receive a refund, the cost of return shipping will be deducted from your refund.</p> <!-- /wp:paragraph -->
<!-- wp:paragraph --> <p>Depending on where you live, the time it may take for your exchanged product to reach you may vary.</p> <!-- /wp:paragraph -->
<!-- wp:paragraph --> <p>If you are returning more expensive items, you may consider using a trackable shipping service or purchasing shipping insurance. We don’t guarantee that we will receive your returned item.</p> <!-- /wp:paragraph -->
<!-- wp:heading --> <h2 class="wp-block-heading">Need help?</h2> <!-- /wp:heading -->
<!-- wp:paragraph --> <p>Contact us at {email} for questions related to refunds and returns.</p> <!-- /wp:paragraph -->

Ipanema, 9800 - Horto Florestal </li> </ul> <h2>Sobre o empreendimento</h2> <p>Tranquilidade, contato com a natureza e qualidade de vida se encontram no <strong>Reserva do Horto.</strong> Localizado na Av. Ipanema, na região do Horto Florestal em Sorocaba, este lançamento foi planejado para quem busca viver com mais equilíbrio, sem abrir mão da praticidade urbana. Com áreas verdes, trilhas e uma infraestrutura completa de lazer, o empreendimento oferece um ambiente ideal para famílias e também excelente potencial de valorização, unindo segurança, conforto e bem-estar em um condomínio fechado pensado para o dia a dia.</p> <h2>Informações</h2> <p>Tipologia</p><p>2 e 3 dormitórios</p><p>Metragem</p><p>55m² a 85m²</p><p>Cidade</p><p>Sorocaba - <h2>Metropolitan Business & Living</h2> <ul> <li> <svg aria-hidden="true" viewBox="0 0 384 512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M172.268 501.67C26.97 291.031 0 269.413 0 192 0 85.961 80z"></path></svg> Rua Funchal, 450 - Vila Olímpia </li> </ul> <h2>Sobre o empreendimento</h2> <p>Mobilidade, praticidade e alto potencial de rentabilidade se encontram no <strong>Metropolitan Business & Living</strong>. Localizado na Rua Funchal, no coração da Vila Olímpia, este empreendimento em construção foi pensado para quem busca investir ou viver próximo aos principais centros corporativos de São Paulo. Com studios e apartamentos compactos, áreas compartilhadas modernas e estrutura voltada ao dia a dia urbano, o projeto atende perfeitamente profissionais e investidores que valorizam conveniência, liquidez e valorização em uma das regiões mais estratégicas da cidade.</p> <h2>Informações</h2> <p>Tipologia</p><p>Studios e 1 dormitório</p><p>Metragem</p><p>30m² a 55m²</p><p>Cidade</p><p>São Paulo 8500 - Barra da Tijuca </li> </ul> <h2>Sobre o empreendimento</h2> <p>Tecnologia, praticidade e um estilo de vida moderno se encontram no <strong>Carioca Smart Living</strong>. Localizado na Av. das Américas, na Barra da Tijuca, este lançamento foi desenvolvido para quem busca inovação aliada ao conforto, seja para morar ou investir. Com apartamentos inteligentes equipados com automação, o empreendimento oferece uma experiência conectada e funcional, além de áreas de lazer completas que acompanham o ritmo urbano. Ideal para quem valoriza mobilidade, conveniência e alto potencial de valorização em uma das regiões mais dinâmicas do Rio de Janeiro.</p> <h2>Informações</h2> <p>Tipologia</p><p>Studios e 2 13.773-39.464 0zM192 272c44.183 0 80-35.817 80-80s-35.817-80-80-80-80 35.817-80 80 35.817 80 80 80z"></path></svg><br /> Rua Praia Grande, 320 - Centro </li> </ul> <h2>Sobre o empreendimento</h2> <p>Vista privilegiada, conforto e qualidade de vida se encontram no <strong>Paraíso do Atlântico</strong>. Localizado na Rua Praia Grande, no coração de Arraial do Cabo, este empreendimento em construção foi pensado para quem deseja viver ou investir em um dos destinos mais encantadores do litoral brasileiro. Com arquitetura moderna, áreas de lazer no rooftop e uma vista panorâmica do mar, o projeto proporciona uma experiência única, unindo tranquilidade, valorização imobiliária e a praticidade de estar próximo às principais praias e comércios da região.</p> <h2>Informações</h2> <p>Tipologia</p> <p>2 e 3 quartos</p> <p>Metragem</p> <p>60m² a 95m²</p> <p>Cidade</p> <p>Arraial do Cabo - RJ</p> <h2>Costa Verde Resort Living</h2> <ul> <li> <svg aria-hidden="true" viewBox="0 0 384 512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M172.268 501.67C26.97 291.031 0 269.413 0 192 0 85.961 85.961 0 Rodovia Rio-Santos, Km 505 - Praia do Frade </li> </ul> <h2>Sobre o empreendimento</h2> <p>Exclusividade, sofisticação e contato direto com a natureza definem o <strong>Costa Verde Resort Living</strong>. Localizado na deslumbrante Rodovia Rio-Santos, na região da Praia do Frade, em Angra dos Reis, este empreendimento pronto para morar foi pensado para quem busca um refúgio de alto padrão com conforto absoluto. Com infraestrutura completa de lazer, incluindo marina privativa e acesso direto ao mar, o projeto oferece uma experiência única de viver em um verdadeiro resort, cercado por paisagens paradisíacas e com todo o requinte que a região proporciona. Ideal tanto para moradia quanto para investimento em um dos destinos mais valorizados do litoral brasileiro.</p> <h2>Informações</h2> <p>Tipologia</p><p>2 a 4 suítes</p><p>Metragem</p><p>80m² a Com infraestrutura completa de lazer, incluindo marina privativa e acesso direto ao mar, o projeto oferece uma experi\u00eancia \u00fanica de viver em um verdadeiro resort, cercado por paisagens paradis\u00edacas e com todo o requinte que a regi\u00e3o proporciona. Batel, este empreendimento em construção foi pensado para quem busca qualidade de vida aliada a sofisticação, seja para morar ou investir. Com arquitetura contemporânea, áreas de lazer completas e um rooftop com vista panorâmica da cidade, o projeto traduz o estilo urbano de Curitiba em cada detalhe, oferecendo praticidade no dia a dia e alto potencial de valorização em uma das regiões mais nobres da cidade.</p> <h2>Informações</h2> <p>Tipologia</p><p>2 e 3 dormitórios (até 2 suítes)</p><p>Metragem</p><p>68m² a
